subject: Move master back to the 18.02.2021
commit_message:
Move master back to the 18.02.2021

Created just to test on the gating if we are able to get a successful
run on master branch from that date.

Issue-ID: OOM-1
Change-Id: Ib5055094739a6726df4a46b6dcbf6ff5736ec3ec
Signed-off-by: Krzysztof Opasiak <k.opasiak@samsung.com>

Patch Set 1: Verified-1

Build Failed 

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1505/ : FAILURE

Unreleased image detected. Only released images are allowed in oom helm charts. ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-image-verify/1505/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-image-verify/1505

https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/946/ : FAILURE

The Commit title must follow this pattern "[WHAT] A title"

WHAT can be a component name (AAI for example), DOC for documentation, COMMON for common, ...

The title must start with a capital letter (A in the example) and a space must be set between the end of the topic and the actual title: "] A title" ( https://jenkins.onap.org/job/oom-master-commit-lint/946/ )

Logs: https://logs.onap.org/production/vex-yul-ecomp-jenkins-1/oom-master-commit-lint/946

ok when the deployment is OK, all the E2E tests are PASS...on the 18th of February
https://gitlab.com/Orange-OpenSource/lfn/onap/xtesting-onap/-/pipelines/268588880

but basic_onboard is FAILING the 2 times all the E2E tests are OK
the code is the same, basic_onboard is "just" the beginning of basic_vm|cnf|network using another descriptor
according to the logs, the VF is created
when we want to certify it, the SDC answers that the resource does not exist (it just answers that it was created)
strange all the more as the E2E tests are following exactly the same track
